summary: Added a real-PDF sample-pipeline regression for 13winter11_q10, the highest-ranked suspicious crop candidate.

files_changed.why: Added W11 P13 fixture constants and a q10 mark-scheme boundary regression.

test_results: Run-local probe regenerated q10 with text containing q10, excluding q9, and a 1606x4616 image.
deviations_from_plan: No parser code change was needed because the current dirty worktree already appears to repair the stale canonical q10 crop.
repo_hygiene_notes: The intended probe output was written under the run folder.
One earlier exploratory probe accidentally used the default output root before being rerun correctly; this touched the generated q10 image under output/ and is documented here.
known_risks: The canonical output set still needs a deliberate rebuild or targeted repair manifest; this test only proves current code can regenerate q10 correctly.
